mapper.insert: INSERT INTO search_telemetry (user_id, query_text, result_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{queryText}, #{resultCount})
mapper.select: SELECT query_text AS term, COUNT(*) AS searchCount, MIN(searched_at) AS periodStart, MAX(searched_at) AS periodEnd, NOW() AS calculatedAt FROM search_telemetry WHERE searched_at >= #{since} GROUP BY query_text ORDER BY searchCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}
